text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! Crackle, rumble!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! The rain's really comin' down! There's a
tree by the road I can go hide under—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Fuji? Looks like you beat me to it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hey, El, you're taking shelter from the rain too?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's like a squall ringing from the south. As though
a thunder spirit is unleashing its wrath upon the
earth. Listen, here it comes again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom! Boom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Fear not, for there is no storm without sunlight.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Look to yonder sky, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: H-huh? It's already cleared up...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The thunderclouds are soaked in vermillion, for
they cannot shroud the sky forever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And before long, we shall witness...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The stars—too many to grasp, much less count by
hand—blanketing the sky.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And so, as one player leaves the stage, another
steps forward to play the lead.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Um... one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight,
nine, ten...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've won more times than I can count by
hand!
choice_data_list: Yeah, you've won more than ten G1 races.
Yeah, you've won more than ten G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To think there would ever be an Umamusume to
win eleven G1 dirt races... it's the stuff legends
are made of.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Eleven... Oh. That reminds me of a feng shui
reading I did to see my long-term future.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I saw eleven stars. It must have been a portent...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Still, I never imagined it would come true this
fast! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her momentum was like a shooting star blazing
through the sky. And on the day of the awards
ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Big Thanks! I really appreciate
your warm welcome today!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I was able to win so many G1
races is thanks to everyone's support, all my
friends, and, of course, my trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you guys don't mind, I'd like you to give
another round of applause with equal enthusiasm
to my friends and trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Rickey looks so thrilled. And she's even thinking
of us...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Having everyone's eyes on me like this... I
think I'm more nervous than her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She never, ever forgets to consider the people
around her, and it is exactly that attitude that led
her to such a grand achievement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her victory isn't just a coincidence—it comes from
the careful arrangement of her environment built
on a rock-solid foundation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, there's one more person I have to show
my appreciation for.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Will you come with me? I wouldn't be able to go
if I hadn't gotten this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the place Copano Rickey heads toward
is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, he's here! See, Kita? ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey there! It's been a while!

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the park that Copano Rickey and Kitasan
Black used to play in together as children.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here, the person who allowed them to run around
freely stands there with a kind expression on his
face.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Because of all that you did for me...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was able to win so many races! Kita has also
been running really well herself!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wish I could give you a piece of the trophy. ♪
No matter how much I thank you, it'll never be
enough! ☆

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text: Haha, of course. I always watch you two on TV!

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you to share that trophy though. I've
already gotten so much from you two.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you two dash energetically around the
track like you used to, and coming back safe and
sound—that's more than enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
I want you to keep running with smiles on your
faces. That is my only wish.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: We will! Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you must be Rickey's trainer, if I'm not
mistaken?

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Please take care of little Rickey for me! She's
always been like a daughter to me.
choice_data_list: Of course. We'll drop by again in the future.
Of course. We'll drop by again in the future.

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text: Again, you say?
choice_data_list: This park is like an old home to these two.

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text: An old home... You don't say.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! This is where I first learned to
run. For me, it's an incredibly important place. ☆
That's why...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We'll be back! When I get the chance, I'll visit
again with Kita! ♪

text_block_list.name: Old Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Sure, drop by whenever you like. We'll all be
waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe, someday in the distant future, Copano
Rickey will spend time at this park, watching the
days go by.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, that is still a long way off. For now,
she'll focus on racking up more and more victories
before she returns.
